ocr_findings.description: Citation label: image shows '出所' but OCR renders '説明' before the IPA syllabus URL. Low severity as the URL itself is correctly captured and the meaning is not materially changed.

reviewer_notes: Classic chapter title page: large '第9章' heading, large title '基礎理論とアルゴリズム', brief intro paragraph, bullet point list of learning objectives, and a classification table. The body content is introductory/structural with no detailed lesson content, matching the chapter_title label. OCR is accurate overall with only one minor label substitution.
